findings.evidence: `code/.../AlmostComplex.lean:167:lemma neg_apply_swap`; Mathlib has `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/BilinearForm/Properties.lean:242:theorem neg_eq (H : B₁.IsAlt) (x y : M₁) : -B₁ x y = B₁ y x`.
findings.fix: Rename it to match the existing Mathlib terminology, e.g. `neg_eq` in the `SymplecticForm` namespace.
findings.issue: `SymplecticForm.neg_apply_swap` uses nonstandard wording for the alternating-form conclusion `-ω v w = ω w v`.

findings.evidence: `code/.../AlmostComplex.lean:234:lemma Compatible.apply_apply ... : ω (J v) (J w) = ω v w`; the adjacent predicate is explicitly `Invariant` at lines 195-199.
findings.fix: Rename it to a conclusion-oriented name such as `Compatible.invariant_apply`.
findings.issue: `Compatible.apply_apply` is too syntactic and does not name the conclusion, namely pointwise `J`-invariance of `ω`.

summary: Two theorem names do not describe their conclusions in the local/Mathlib terminology; no notation issues found.
